milestones.label: Start
checklist: Temp pork butts on smoker (verify 195°F+ internal temp)
Take pork butts off smoker and wrap on bus
Check meat lugs in the walk-in and rotate them as needed
Consult with mgr on duty for today's cooking needs
Cut ribs & load raw meats on smoker
Add 3–4 logs of wood (leave firebox door open)
⚠️ Set smoker dial to 250°F

milestones.label: Begin cooking
checklist: Close doors and start smoker (rack, fan, & burner switched on)
⚠️ Clean smoker work area
Hose off the concrete slab
Run trash & paper recycling to dumpsters
Lunch break

milestones.label: Check smoker temp
checklist: Verify smoker temp gauge has reached 250°F
⚠️ Close firebox door
Write out labels for meat lugs & pulled pork pans
Begin pulling pork on bus

milestones.label: Wings finished
checklist: Temp large drums (165°F+ internal temp) and remove wings
Move bottom ribs up to the top rack (where the wings were)
Temp small turkey breasts (every ~30 mins)
Continue pulling pork on bus

milestones.label: Turkey finished?
checklist: Temp remaining turkey breasts (165°F+ internal temp)
⚠️ Turn smoker dial down to 225°F (after all turkey is done)
Finish pulling pork on bus
Move pulled pork pans to walk-in
⚠️ Clean bus work area

milestones.label: Hotdogs
checklist: Load hotdogs on smoker (cook for 45 minutes)
Gather clean lugs for all remaining meat and label

milestones.label: Hotdogs, ribs, & tips finished
checklist: Temp ribs (verify 195°F+ internal temp)
Move all smoked meat to walk-in for cooldown (uncovered)
Load pork butts for the night
⚠️ Set smoker dial to 215°F (overnight)
Add 3-4 logs of wood to the firebox & start smoker
⚠️ Clean smoker work area
Run trash & recycling to dumpsters
Lock smoker doors
